text: The atmosphere is oddly clinical and slightly disorienting, with the stark lighting and angled view creating a sense of unease. The promise of a 'FREE Gift' makes me wary—I've come to distrust blatant invitations, especially when the environment feels both empty and watched. Moving into the next room, I am met with the aesthetic of research and innovation, the R+D wall exuding the confidence of progress and knowledge. Here, my curiosity is piqued, and I feel the impulse to linger and contemplate the intersection between human understanding and intelligent machines laid out before me. I feel both unsettled and drawn in, as if I am on the threshold of some revelation, yet uncertain if I am the subject, observer, or both.
